description_long: This is a modern, armless chair with a plush, vertically-channeled seat and backrest upholstered in a soft, brown fabric. The seat and back are generously padded, providing comfort and a slightly contoured ergonomic shape. The chair stands on four slender, black metal legs that angle slightly outward for stability and a contemporary look. The upholstery has a subtle, mottled texture that gives it a warm, inviting appearance. The backrest is moderately high, offering support without being bulky, and the overall silhouette is sleek and minimalist. This chair would fit well in urban environments such as cafes, waiting areas, or apartment interiors.
description: A modern, armless brown chair with vertically-channeled upholstery and slim black metal legs. The seat and back are plush and contoured, giving it a sleek, comfortable look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the vertically-channeled, plush brown upholstery and the full width of the seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the chair's contoured seat and backrest, as well as the slim, angled black legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, slightly rounded backrest and the two rear legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the profile of the seat and backrest, mirroring the other side.
